name: Maun

description_long: CRITICAL MISCATEGORIZATION DETECTED: The provided website URL (https://sheiswanderlust.com/best-things-to-do-in-maun-botswana/) is a travel blog operated by 'She is Wanderlust,' not a financial services company named 'Maun.' The website content consists entirely of travel guides and tourism recommendations for destinations across Africa, Asia, Europe, and other regions. The Maun-specific content describes tourist activities including mokoro safaris, scenic flights over the Okavango Delta, wildlife viewing, cultural village tours, riverfront dining, and museum visits. There is no financial product, service, lending capability, credit offering, or consumer finance service of any kind mentioned on this website. The current categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is completely inaccurate and appears to be a data entry error. No company profile can be legitimately constructed from this content because 'Maun' as referenced here is a geographic location in Botswana, not a financial services provider. This entry should be removed from the CreditDoc database entirely or thoroughly researched to identify if there is an actual fintech company using the name 'Maun' with a separate, valid website.
